title: Ubiquiti G6 Instant, UniFi Protect camera, 8MP, white
description: The UniFi Protect G6 Instant camera features an 8MP sensor (3840 x 2160px) at 30 fps, IR illumination for night vision up to 6 meters, a built-in microphone, and a speaker. Its fixed lens provides a 109.9° field of view. The camera has a robust and compact polycarbonate body with IK04 vandal resistance and IPX5 water resistance. It connects to the network via Dual-Band WiFi supporting 802.11a/b/g/n/ac standards, and it is powered through a USB-C cable (5V/2A) with a maximum power consumption… Thanks to AI implementation, the camera supports advanced detection features such as face detection, license plate recognition, and smart object recognition (person, vehicle, animal) 8MP, 30 FPS video AI smart detection Night mode with IR LEDs IPX5 weather-resistant enclosure Built-in microphone and speaker Powered via USB-C Managed by UniFi Protect software Vandal-resistant â IK04 Device Screws + wall plugs Plastic wall mount plate USB-C cable
